title: Scope Entry
description: Schema for a scope-domain truth record. Each entry captures one scope fact: a scope boundary, inclusion/exclusion rule, trade coordination interface, work-breakdown mapping, or scope-to-division alignment.

entry_id.description: Unique identifier for this scope entry.

csi_sections.description: CSI section numbers this scope entry relates to.

responsible_trade.description: Trade responsible for this scope item (e.g., 'roofing', 'waterproofing', 'sheet_metal', 'glazing').

adjacent_trades.description: Trades with coordination dependencies at this scope boundary.

interface_zones.description: Interface zone IDs from the shared registry where scope handoffs occur.

control_layers_affected.description: Control layer IDs affected by this scope boundary.
